title: cynomoriales
intro: The cynomoriales rank is an order of flowering plants, specifically a clade within the monocots. It is characterized by the presence of trimerous flowers and a distinct arrangement of stamens and carpels. The cynomoriales order comprises several families, including the Orchidaceae, known for its diverse and showy orchids, as well as the Euphorbiaceae and Cyperaceae families. These families exhibit a range of adaptations and growth forms, from the succulent stems of euphorbs to the grass-like habit of cypresses.

families.family_desc: Cynomoriaceae is a family of flowering plants in the order Celastrales, commonly known as the goldenseal family.
